title: elymus vulpinus
intro: Elymus vulpinus, also known as wolf's tail grass, is a type of perennial grass native to North America. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties that can help to soothe wounds and reduce swelling. The health benefits of Elymus vulpinus include its ability to support respiratory health, reduce fever, and aid in the treatment of various skin conditions. Elymus vulpinus can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and salves, and is often used in traditional folk medicine to promote overall well-being.
